name: fetch first → CONFLICT
args:
error: failed to push some refs
hint: Updates were rejected; fetch first

name: could not resolve host → TRANSIENT
args: fatal: unable to access ...: Could not resolve host: github.com

name: connection refused → TRANSIENT
args: ssh: connect to host github.com port 22: Connection refused

name: permission/auth failure → TRANSIENT
args:
remote: Permission denied
fatal: Authentication failed

name: timed out → TRANSIENT
args: fatal: unable to access: Operation timed out

name: unrecognised non-empty failure → TRANSIENT (default)
args: some weird git output we have never seen
